gemini_api_key_description: Enter API key for Google Gemini. The key is used for text recognition from PDF files.
exchange_rate_api_key_description: Enter API key for ExchangeRate API (optional). If not specified, free API exchangerate-api.com will be used.
exchange_rate_api_key_hint: Get your key at exchangerate-api.com, fixer.io or other service. Leave empty to use free API.
gemini_model_description: Select Gemini model for text recognition from PDF. You can enter model name manually or choose from suggested ones.
gemini_model_hint: Available models: gemini-2.5-flash (recommended), gemini-2.5-pro, gemini-2.0-flash-exp, gemini-1.5-flash, gemini-1.5-pro

error_state.title: Couldn’t load data
error_state.message: Check your connection and try again.

onboarding_sub: Track expenses, visualize your money, and keep things simple.

ftue.title: Welcome to your financial hub
ftue.message: Add your first expense manually or import a statement so the app can start learning your habits.

hero.ftue_micro: Add an expense or import a statement to unlock your pulse and forecast.

budget_exceeded.title: Budget exceeded
budget_exceeded.context: One or more limits are over the line. The plan is off track.

budget_warning.title: Limit almost gone
budget_warning.context: The budget is nearly used up — room for only a few transactions.

safe.title: You’re on track
safe.context: Spending fits your budgets and your usual habits.

runway.critical: At this pace, surplus covers about {} more days
runway.warning: At this pace, the cushion runs out in about {} days

decision.title: Financial state
decision.state_stable: You are in a good place
decision.state_danger: This pace runs out of room fast
decision.micro_action_stable: You can keep a normal rhythm today — nothing loud is flashing.
decision.micro_action_caution: You could trim spending slightly — it keeps the month calmer.
decision.micro_action_danger: Try to spend less today — your cushion is thin.
decision.insight_overall_lead_high: You have picked up speed vs your usual pace by now — that is often how overspend starts.
decision.insight_overall_lead_medium: You are probably above your usual pace for this time — it helps not to push it further.
decision.insight_overall_lead_low: It looks like you are faster than your typical habit by now — read it gently; the pattern is noisy.
decision.insight_category_lead_high: «{category}» is clearly above your norm for this time — it is the main lever today.
decision.insight_category_lead_medium: «{category}» is probably above your usual pace for this time — keep it in mind.
decision.insight_category_lead_low: «{category}» seems above your habit for this time — treat it as a soft signal.
decision.insight_overall_lead_high_accel: You are above norm for this time, and the last days add more speed — it is a real ramp-up.
decision.insight_overall_lead_medium_accel: You are likely above norm, and recent days are feeding the pace.
decision.insight_overall_lead_low_accel: It looks like you are above habit, with recent days adding speed — do not ignore it.
decision.insight_overall_lead_high_slow: You are still above norm, but your pace vs norm is easing — the right direction.
decision.insight_overall_lead_medium_slow: You are likely above norm, yet recent days are calmer — you can lock that in.
decision.insight_overall_lead_low_slow: It still looks above norm, but the pace has softened vs last week.
decision.insight_category_lead_high_accel: «{category}» is well above norm — and its pace is still climbing.
decision.insight_category_lead_medium_accel: «{category}» is probably above usual, with recent days reinforcing it.
decision.insight_category_lead_low_accel: «{category}» is pulling up, and recent days look steeper — read it softly.
decision.insight_category_lead_high_slow: «{category}» is still above norm, but recent pace is cooling — a good sign.
decision.insight_category_lead_medium_slow: «{category}» is likely above norm, yet the rhythm is softer.
decision.insight_category_lead_low_slow: «{category}» still looks above habit, but the acceleration is fading.
decision.synthesis_overall_runway_accel: You are ahead of norm and still accelerating vs it — at this month's pace, surplus covers about {days} more days.
decision.synthesis_overall_runway_slow: You are above norm, but the pace is easing — at this rhythm, surplus covers about {days} more days.
decision.synthesis_overall_runway_stable: You are above norm in a steady way vs history — at this pace, surplus covers about {days} more days.
decision.synthesis_overall_runway_first_accel: Only about {days} days of surplus at this pace — very tight. You are also accelerating vs your norm.
decision.synthesis_overall_runway_first_slow: Roughly {days} days of cushion at this rhythm — narrow; still, you are slowing vs norm.
decision.synthesis_overall_runway_first_stable: Surplus lasts about {days} days at this pace — tight while spending stays above norm.
decision.synthesis_overall_deviation_first_accel: A sharp gap vs norm, and the pace is still rising — surplus is about {days} days at this rhythm.
decision.synthesis_overall_deviation_first_slow: Clearly above norm, but the pace is easing — surplus around {days} days at this pace.
decision.synthesis_overall_deviation_first_stable: Steadily above norm vs history — about {days} days of surplus at this pace.
decision.synthesis_category_runway_accel: «{category}» is driving spend with a strengthening pace — surplus covers about {days} more days at this rhythm.
decision.synthesis_category_runway_slow: «{category}» is above norm but softening — surplus covers about {days} more days.
decision.synthesis_category_runway_stable: «{category}» is holding above norm — at this pace, surplus covers about {days} more days.
decision.synthesis_category_runway_first_accel: About {days} days of surplus at this pace — very little. «{category}» is also speeding the overspend.
decision.synthesis_category_runway_first_slow: Roughly {days} days left — tight; «{category}» is at least slowing vs norm.
decision.synthesis_category_runway_first_stable: ~{days} days of cushion at this rhythm — small with «{category}» above norm.
decision.synthesis_category_deviation_first_accel: «{category}» is far above norm and gaining speed — surplus about {days} days at this pace.
decision.synthesis_category_deviation_first_slow: «{category}» is clearly above norm, but easing — surplus around {days} days.
decision.synthesis_category_deviation_first_stabl: «{category}» keeps you above norm — about {days} days of surplus at this pace.
decision.synthesis_overall_forecast_stable: Day-by-day cushion looks comfortable, but at this pace month-end spending could land around {amount}.
decision.synthesis_overall_forecast_accel: You are above norm and still speeding up — at this rhythm, month-end spending could reach about {amount}.
decision.synthesis_overall_forecast_slow: You are above norm, but easing — a rough month-end spending guide is around {amount}.
decision.synthesis_category_forecast_stable: «{category}» is pulling spending up; with a wide cushion, month-end spending could still land around {amount}.
decision.synthesis_category_forecast_accel: «{category}» is accelerating — at this pace, expect roughly {amount} in spending by month end.
decision.synthesis_category_forecast_slow: «{category}» is above norm but cooling — month-end spending may settle around {amount}.
decision.insight_detail_high: By {time} you are usually around {usual}; today already {current} — a clear jump, about {excess}% above norm.
decision.insight_detail_medium: By {time} you are usually closer to {usual}; today {current} — roughly {excess}% above your usual pace.
decision.insight_detail_low: With uneven data, by {time} you are often near {usual}; today {current} — looks like ~{excess}% above norm; read carefully.
decision.runway_days: At this pace, today’s month surplus could cover about {days} more days of spending.
decision.trend_accelerating: Your spending pace vs your norm has picked up recently — you are accelerating.
decision.trend_slowing: Your spending pace vs your norm has eased — you are slower than in the prior stretch.

list.title: Transactions
list.empty: No expenses yet. Add the first record!

form.title: New entry
form.scan_failed: Failed to recognize receipt. Try taking a clearer photo.
form.category_uncertain_hint: Category was inferred from similar past entries — change it if needed.

learning.remember_prompt: Save this hint for similar notes?

categories.title: Categories
categories.name: Name
categories.item_subtitle: Groups items in reports and analytics

delete.title: Delete category?
delete.message: Transactions with this category will remain, but without category.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.empty_charts_message: Add your first expense or import a statement to see charts here.

snapshot.title: Financial snapshot
snapshot.subtitle: Current month — same logic as Home
snapshot.ftue_message: Add an expense or import a statement — then this snapshot will match Home and stay in sync.

import.title: Import
import.pdf_description: Import from PDF file (supports files exported from the app)
import.success_enriched: Imported {0} records. Categories assigned to {1} of them.
import.pdf_error: Failed to extract data from PDF
import.pdf_error_details: The PDF file uses complex compression that is not supported by the current version of the app.
import.pdf_alternative1: • Export data from Kaspi app to CSV/JSON
import.pdf_alternative3: • Copy text from PDF and paste into CSV file
import.pdf_alternative4: • Use files exported from this app

review.title: Review import
review.empty: No import draft. Go back and pick a file.
review.recap: Saved: {0}. Skipped: {1}. Category changed from suggestion: {2}.
review.recap_with_errors: Saved: {0}. Skipped: {1}. Category changed: {2}. Write errors: {3}.
review.reinforce_hint: Similar rows updated. You can add rules in Categories.

recurring.title: Subscriptions
recurring.name: Name
recurring.empty_hint: Create a subscription to automatically generate transactions
recurring.delete_message: The subscription will be deleted, but already generated transactions will remain.

backup.title: Backups
backup.subtitle: Create and restore backup copies
backup.create_description: Create a backup of all your data (transactions, categories, budgets, debts and rules)
backup.created_message: Backup created successfully. You can share the file or save it in a safe place.
backup.restore_description: Restore data from a previously created backup
backup.restore_confirm_message: All current data will be replaced with data from the backup. This action cannot be undone.
backup.delete_message: This backup file will be deleted from the device.

slide1.title: Track Your Expenses
slide1.description: Easily add income and expenses with categories and notes. All your transactions in one place.

slide2.title: Your financial pulse
slide2.description: The home screen shows balance, spending rhythm, and forecasts — a pulse for your money. The more you track, the clearer the picture.

slide3.title: Budgets and Limits
slide3.description: Create budgets by categories and periods. Track progress and get notifications when limits are exceeded.

slide4.title: Debt Management
slide4.description: Track debts and loans. Keep records of what you owe and what is owed to you, with automatic transaction creation.

slide5.title: Smart import
slide5.description: Upload bank statements and the app categorizes them. Correct a mistake once, and the system remembers your choice for similar transactions.

slide6.title: Security
slide6.description: Protect your financial data with biometric authentication (Face ID / Fingerprint).

budget.title: Budgets
budget.name: Name
budget.warning_threshold_hint: You'll get a warning when reaching this percentage
budget.notifications_hint: Receive notifications when approaching the limit
budget.empty_message: Create a budget to control expenses by category or set an overall limit
budget.delete_message: Budget "{0}" will be deleted. This won't affect your transactions.

rules.title: Categorization Rules
rules.empty_message: Create rules for automatic categorization of transactions during import

debts.empty_they_owe: No one owes you yet. Add the first debt!
debts.delete_message: Debt "{0}" will be deleted. This won't affect transactions.

biometric.title: Biometric
biometric.not_available: Biometric authentication is not available on this device
biometric.enable_reason: Enable biometric authentication to protect the app
biometric.info_available: Your device supports {0}. You can use it to protect the app.
biometric.info_not_available: Biometric authentication is not available on this device.
biometric.info_description: When biometric authentication is enabled, the app will require authentication on launch and after minimizing.

delete_all_expenses_message: All expenses and income will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone. It is recommended to create a backup before deleting.
